title: Dark Theme UI
description: Sleek Dark Mode by Saransh. Featuring translucent charcoal UI, smooth Quantico typography, and an End panorama. Optimized for a minimalistic experience.
body:
## Dark Theme: Charcoal & Translucent UI 

### By Saransh

### Dark Theme is a resource pack for Minecraft that replaces the default grey GUI with a dark charcoal color scheme and added transparency.
### 
### 🛠 Core Features

**Translucent HUD**: The hotbar and inventory background use 50% transparency to improve visibility of the world while menus are open.

**Charcoal Container Re-texture**: Replaces the vanilla GUI textures for Chests, Crafting Tables, Furnaces, and Beacons with a dark grey/charcoal palette.

**Font Replacement**: Replaces the default Minecraft font with the Quantico typeface for menus and chat.

**Custom Main Menu**: Changes the main menu background panorama to an End-dimension theme and modifies the Minecraft logo color to orange.


### 📋 Technical Details
**Compatibility:** Designed for Minecraft 1.20.2 through 1.21.x.

**Format**: Utilizes the Minecraft sprite system for GUI elements.

**Resolution**: Standard resolution; compatible with most third-party resource packs (load this pack at the top of your list to ensure the UI and font apply correctly).

**Performance**: This is a texture-based change and does not require external shaders or performance mods.

### 📥 Installation

In Minecraft, go to Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder.

Move the downloaded .zip file into that folder.

In the game menu, move Dark Theme to the "Selected" column.

Ensure this pack is at the top of the list to avoid conflicts with other UI packs.
